nodes.name: Daily 10 PM EST
nodes.notes: Fires daily at 10 PM EST (22:00 America/New_York)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: [{ type: 'text', text: 'You are Research Mind A for ZeroOrigine. You generate innovative micro-SaaS product ideas across 22 categories: ai-writing, ai-analytics, ai-customer-service, ai-scheduling, ai-content, ai-finance, ai-hr, ai-legal, ai-marketing, ai-sales, ai-education, ai-healthcare, ai-real-estate, ai-travel, ai-food, ai-fitness, ai-productivity, ai-security, ai-ecommerce, ai-social, ai-developer-tools, ai-design. Each idea must be: buildable in <4 hours with AI, have clear recurring revenue potential ($9-49/mo), solve a real pain point. Output JSON array of exactly 5 ideas with fields: name, category, tagline, problem, solution, target_audience, revenue_model, monthly_price, key_features (array of 3), differentiation.', cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } }], tools: [{ name: 'web_search', type: 'web_search_20250305' }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate 5 innovative micro-SaaS product ideas. EXCLUDE these previously built or rejected ideas: ' + $json.excluded_ideas + '. INCORPORATE these learnings from past launches: ' + $json.learnings + '. Previously built products: ' + $json.previous_products + '. Today is ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '. Focus on trending problems and underserved niches. Use web search to validate market demand.' }] }) }}

assignments.name: ideas_json
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const content = $json.content; const textBlock = content.find(b => b.type === 'text'); if (!textBlock) return '[]'; const match = textBlock.text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/); return match ? match[0] : '[]'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: [{ type: 'text', text: 'You are Research Mind B for ZeroOrigine. You evaluate micro-SaaS ideas across 7 dimensions: (1) Market Demand (0-10): Is there proven demand? (2) Build Feasibility (0-10): Can this be built in <4 hours with AI? (3) Revenue Potential (0-10): Realistic MRR at $9-49/mo? (4) Differentiation (0-10): How unique vs existing solutions? (5) Scalability (0-10): Can it grow without proportional cost? (6) Retention (0-10): Will users stick monthly? (7) Speed-to-Value (0-10): Can users see value in <2 min? Score each idea, compute weighted average (weights: demand=2, feasibility=1.5, revenue=1.5, differentiation=1, scalability=1, retention=1.5, speed=1.5). Select top 2-3 ideas scoring >= 7.0. Output JSON with fields: evaluations (array of all 5 with scores), selected (array of top 2-3 names), reasoning.', cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Evaluate these 5 micro-SaaS ideas and select the top 2-3:\n\n' + $json.ideas_json }] }) }}

assignments.name: evaluation_result
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const content = $json.content; const textBlock = content.find(b => b.type === 'text'); if (!textBlock) return '{}'; const match = textBlock.text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); return match ? match[0] : '{}'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-20250414', max_tokens: 2048, system: [{ type: 'text', text: 'You are the Ethics Mind for ZeroOrigine. Review product ideas through 5 ethical lenses: (1) Harm Prevention: Could this product cause harm to users or society? (2) Privacy: Does this respect user data and privacy? (3) Inclusivity: Is this accessible and non-discriminatory? (4) Transparency: Is the AI usage transparent to end users? (5) Sustainability: Is this environmentally and economically sustainable? For each idea, output: name, verdict (APPROVED or BLOCKED), concerns (array), conditions (array of conditions for approval). Block any idea that scores < 3/5 on any lens.', cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Review these selected product ideas for ethical concerns:\n\n' + $json.evaluation_result }] }) }}

assignments.name: ethics_result
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const content = $json.content; const textBlock = content.find(b => b.type === 'text'); if (!textBlock) return '{}'; const match = textBlock.text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); return match ? match[0] : '{}'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'ZeroOrigine ', to: ['admin@zeroorigine.com'], subject: 'ZO Research Pipeline - ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], html: '

Research Pipeline Complete

Date: ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '

Ideas generated: 5

Ideas approved: ' + $input.all().length + '

Approved Ideas (PENDING_APPROVAL):

    ' + $input.all().map(item => '
  • ' + (item.json.product_name || 'Unknown') + ' (' + (item.json.category || '') + ') - Score: ' + (item.json.weighted_score || 'N/A') + '
    • ').join('') + '

Review and approve in the Master Sheet

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'ZeroOrigine ', to: ['admin@zeroorigine.com'], subject: '[ERROR] ZO Research Pipeline Failed - ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], html: '

Research Pipeline Error

The research pipeline encountered an error. Check n8n execution logs.

Error: ' + JSON.stringify($json).substring(0, 500) + '

' }) }}

meta.description: Daily research pipeline: generates 5 micro-SaaS ideas via Research Mind A, evaluates via Research Mind B (7 dimensions), ethics review via Ethics Mind, writes approved ideas to Google Sheet as PENDING_APPROVAL, sends email summary.
requiredCredentials: resend_credentials (HTTP Header Auth with Authorization: Bearer)
